A '''magnetic bottle''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Engine/Legends|engine]] component.<ref name="RPG" /> The component fed [[Hydrogen/Legends|hydrogen]] to [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] systems. It was vital for [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drives]]. Many magnetic bottles were shielded by [[Polydex-9]] shielding compounds.<ref name="J4">{{JournalCite|4|Enemies for Life}}</ref> Failure of the magnetic bottle during flight could cause a large amount of damage to the starship.<ref name="RPG" /> Magnetic bottles were also used in welding and cutting tools, holding superheated [[Gas/Legends|gas]] used in the operation of the device.<ref name="SWS">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref>

{{Tech-stub}}
